title: Beneath The Streets Underground History Tour - Seattle
content: Our tour provided a great history of Seattle and was a lot of fun. Our guide, Patti, was knowledgable and enthusiastic. Highly recommended!

title: BENEATH THE STREETS - Updated June 2026

title: Beneath The Streets Underground History Tour
content: This tour was a treat! It exceeded my expectations. We learned about the history of Seattle and explored parts of the original streets and buildings.

title: Beneath the Streets Underground History Tours | Underground History Tours | 102 Cherry Street, Seattle, WA, USA
content: Seattle Underground Tour Beneath The Streets Logo. ###### Seattle's Highest Rated Underground Tour! Beneath the Streets offers boutique underground tours that provide authentic,one-of-a-kind, explorations of Seattle's historic underground passageways in Pioneer Square, the city’s original neighborhood. Our one hour walking tours are led by experienced  and engaging guides who are passionate about Seattle's rich history. Our guides also share insider tips and local favorites to enhance your visit! Tours are one hour and depart multiple times daily. -- After Hours: The Adult Version of our Tour. Adults only tour with a focus on the "underside" of underground history. You will see and learn about the Seattle underground and Pioneer Square but with more adult themes than the standard tour. This tour is for guests 18 and older. \*15.35% tax added to all sales. Queer History Tour Seattle Underground.jpg). ###### The Queer Underground History Tour. Click here to see schedule. For parking information click here and enter 102 Cherry Street as your destination.
